source.notes: County-level context prepared for a future Saline GWorks/MIPS parcel. Historical ratio context is compiled from annual PAD R&O all-rows; 2026 market grouping and assessor-process notes come from the 2026 R&O.

residential.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

commercial.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

agricultural.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

schoolBondAgriculturalLand.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

residential: Nine valuation groups based on geographic and economic characteristics.
Residential inspection cycle is in compliance with the six-year inspection and review requirement.
2026 R&O notes value adjustments for DeWitt (+10%), Friend (+15%), Wilber (+10%), and Blue River Lodge cabins (+25%).
commercial: Six commercial valuation groups; group 2 is the only group with sufficient sales for statistical analysis in the 2026 R&O.
Commercial inspection/review cycle is in compliance; contract appraiser used for reviews.
2026 R&O notes Wilber commercial appeared out of compliance and received a +6% increase.
agricultural: Three agricultural market areas based on topography, water availability, and market.
R&O reports no changes needed in Market Area 1, dryland adjustment needed in Market Area 2, and irrigated adjustment needed in Market Area 3.
